response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering skills and breadth across many domains, this role requires qualifications he fundamentally lacks: native-level Japanese proficiency (explicitly required), current strong C proficiency for UNIX embedded systems (his last C work was 10+ years ago; now focused on JavaScript/TypeScript), and deep embedded firmware/networking security expertise. The role needs a specialist in low-level systems and security; Bogdan's strength is full-stack modern web and application development.
strengths: Extensive 14+ years of software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded domains
Demonstrated mastery of software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and testable architecture
Proven ability to quickly learn new technologies and languages, with experience across 10+ programming languages
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (explicitly required); resume shows only English, Romanian, and German fluency
C programming last used 10+ years ago (2014-2015); current focus is JavaScript/TypeScript and web technologies, creating a critical skills gap
No background in embedded firmware development, networking protocols, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X), or Linux kernel modification required for the role

key_factors.factor: Severely outdated C expertise for embedded systems
No embedded firmware or networking security specialization
